creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 154114
Makefile patch adding CPE information

sysutils/screen (which this port is based on) has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2009-1215). This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
